name: FormBuilder

values.name: new
values.comment: Creates and render a new form. Should be used in main views.
values.type: String -> String -> List (Html msg) -> Html msg

name: FormBuilder.FieldBuilder

aliases.name: FieldView
aliases.comment: Represent a view for a field. Takes attributes in parameters, and returns an HTML msg.

values.name: default
values.comment: Generates a default input field. Generates default attributes, use the default view, and render the field with their attributes.
values.type: List (AttributesModifier {} msg) -> Html msg

values.name: defaultHidden
values.comment: Generates a default hidden input field. Generates default attributes, and force the field to be hidden.
values.type: List (AttributesModifier {} msg) -> Html msg

values.name: object
values.comment: Generates a generic object, ready to be renderd by FormBuilder. Accepts attributes, view and modifiers.
values.type: FieldAttributes a msg -> Maybe (FieldView a msg) -> List (AttributesModifier a msg) -> Html msg

name: FormBuilder.FieldBuilder.Events

aliases.name: Event
aliases.comment: Event for triggering Cmd on action on a field.

values.name: onBlur
values.comment: Set the event to trigger on blur on the field.
values.type: msg -> FieldAttributes a msg -> FieldAttributes a msg

values.name: onChange
values.comment: Set the event to trigger on change on the field.
values.type: msg -> FieldAttributes a msg -> FieldAttributes a msg

values.name: onFocus
values.comment: Set the event to trigger on focus on the field.
values.type: msg -> FieldAttributes a msg -> FieldAttributes a msg

values.name: onInput
values.comment: Set the event to trigger on input on the field.
values.type: Event msg -> FieldAttributes a msg -> FieldAttributes a msg

name: FormBuilder.FieldBuilder.Attributes

unions.name: InputType
unions.comment: Represent the desired type for the input. If it should be Hidden, TextArea, Text or File.

aliases.name: AttributesModifier
aliases.comment: Represent a modifier for field attributes. Take attributes as input, and output modified attributes.
aliases.type: FieldAttributes a msg -> FieldAttributes a msg

aliases.name: CommonAttributes
aliases.comment: Common attributes shared by all form fields.
aliases.type: { value : Maybe String, objectName : Maybe String, fieldName : Maybe String, nestedName : Maybe String, nestedIndice : Maybe Int, id : Maybe String, type_ : Maybe InputType, label : Maybe String, placeholder : Maybe String, autocomplete : Maybe Bool, mandatory : Bool, hidden : Bool, options : Maybe (List ( String, Int )), noBottomPadding : Bool, removeNameIfEmpty : Bool, onInput : Maybe (String -> msg), onFocus : Maybe msg, onBlur : Maybe msg, onChange : Maybe msg }

aliases.name: FieldAttributes
aliases.comment: Attributes for a field. Could be extended by subfields.

values.name: autocomplete
values.comment: Set the html autocomplete attribute.
values.type: Bool -> FieldAttributes a msg -> FieldAttributes a msg

values.name: commonAttributes
values.comment: Instantiate default attributes for any fields.
values.type: CommonAttributes msg

values.name: defaultAttributes
values.comment: Instantiate default attributes for any fields.
values.type: FieldAttributes {} msg

values.name: fieldName
values.comment: Set the fieldName of the field.
values.type: String -> FieldAttributes a msg -> FieldAttributes a msg

values.name: hidden
values.comment: Hide the field.
values.type: FieldAttributes a msg -> FieldAttributes a msg

values.name: id
values.comment: Set the id of the field.
values.type: String -> FieldAttributes a msg -> FieldAttributes a msg

values.name: label
values.comment: Set the value of the label.
values.type: String -> FieldAttributes a msg -> FieldAttributes a msg

values.name: mandatory
values.comment: Makes the field mandatory.
values.type: FieldAttributes a msg -> FieldAttributes a msg

values.name: nestedIndice
values.comment: Set the nestedIndice of the field.
values.type: Int -> FieldAttributes a msg -> FieldAttributes a msg

values.name: nestedName
values.comment: Set the nestedName of the field.
values.type: String -> FieldAttributes a msg -> FieldAttributes a msg

values.name: noBottomPadding
values.comment: Disable bottom padding.
values.type: FieldAttributes a msg -> FieldAttributes a msg

values.name: objectName
values.comment: Set the objectName of the field.
values.type: String -> FieldAttributes a msg -> FieldAttributes a msg

values.name: options
values.comment: Set the options of the field.
values.type: List ( String, Int ) -> FieldAttributes a msg -> FieldAttributes a msg

values.name: placeholder
values.comment: Set the placeholder of the field.
values.type: String -> FieldAttributes a msg -> FieldAttributes a msg

values.name: removeNameIfEmpty
values.comment: Remove the html name attribute if the value is Nothing or empty
values.type: FieldAttributes a msg -> FieldAttributes a msg

values.name: type_
values.comment: Set the type of the field.
values.type: InputType -> FieldAttributes a msg -> FieldAttributes a msg

values.name: value
values.comment: Set the value of the field.
values.type: String -> FieldAttributes a msg -> FieldAttributes a msg
